title: Preparation of Lung Tissue Blocks for MPLEx
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4r66o","text":"This protocol details how CMC- and OCT-embedded lung tissue were handled before being submitted to the Metabolites, Lipids, and Protein Extraction (MPLEx) protocol for mass spectrometry analysis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":103,"length":60}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"D15238F9EFB64078928C6424688E04E6","url":"https://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.36wgqd15ovk5/v1"}}}}

before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"2qh8h","text":"Label and weigh a    for each sample.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":18,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"6kevl","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"id":349776,"guid":"4250AD6E341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"2 mL Sorenson MµlTI™ SafeSeal™ Microcentrifuge Tubes","mol_weight":0,"sku":"53550","url":"https://us.vwr.com/store/product/4674100/mltitm-safesealtm-microcentrifuge-tubes-sorenson-bioscience","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":1914,"name":"VWR International (Avantor)","link":"https://www.vwr.com","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}

materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"2aig5","text":"Cryostat (Thermo Fisher CryoStar NX70)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9kjjr","text":"2 mL Sorenson MµlTI SafeSeal Microcentrifuge Tubes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":50}],"data":{}},{"key":"47e6i","text":"Rapid-Core Sampling Punch - 4 mmTed Pella Inc.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":46}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"517AF935AFA2437796B030125062CDFA","url":"https://www.protocols.io/reagents/vwr-international-avantor/2-ml-sorenson-m-lti-safeseal-microcentrifuge-tubes-4250AD6E341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"69C6B7651E0045B1AEE12342B31888CF","url":"https://www.tedpella.com/histo_html/rapid-core-tissue-punches.aspx"}}}}
steps: Place the sample in the cryostat (allow to thermally equilibrate ~20 min)
Cut 2x sections (50 μm) and place sections in pre-weighed 2 mL Sorenson MµlTI™ SafeSeal™ Microcentrifuge Tubes VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #53550
Set blade temperature -16 °C and specimen temperature of -14 °C
Place the sample in the cryostat (allow to thermally equilibrate ~30 min)
Set blade temperature -18 °C and specimen temperature of -16 °C

Use a Rapid-Core Sampling Punch - 4 mm Ted Pella Inc. Catalog #15115-10 to punch 2 tissue cores from each tissue section and place the punches in pre-weighed 2 mL Sorenson MµlTI™ SafeSeal™ Microcentrifuge Tubes VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #53550 *Note: When punching the tissue cores, avoid regions with OCT, as this can be difficult to remove from the sample and may yield contamination within the mass spectrum. Two 50 μm tissue sections after punching two 4 mm tissue cores
Weigh and Store at -80 °C until MPLEx sample preparation .
creator: Brittney Gorman
